mano_cua.result_summary: 在Calendar文档网站中未找到ColorPicker组件入口，文档导航无ColorPicker页面，URL直接访问返回404，页面内搜索无匹配

Navigation Sidebar, Feature pages, Dark Mode page, Event Dialog page all checked. URL patterns tested all return 404. Browser Find (Cmd+F) no matches. Based on extensive investigation, the application does not appear to have this component available.
